generated_oml:
// Simulation chain
instance SimulationDataSource : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Simulation data source within MathWorks Simulink environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedDataTransmission
]

instance SimulatedDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulationDataSource
]

instance SimulatedStateMachineData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data representing state machine execution results from simulation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnvironment
]

instance MathWorksSimulinkEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation environment using MathWorks Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs simulation and evaluates SysML state machines"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateMachineValidationInsight
]

instance StateMachineValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into state machine correctness derived from SysML v1.7 and MontiArc Automaton models"
]

instance SysMLStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machine model used for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnvironment
]

// Code generation chain
instance ModelCodeGenerationSource : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Data source for code generation from MBSE models"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CodeGenerationDataTransmission
]

instance CodeGenerationDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ModelCodeGenerationSource
]

instance CodeGenerationModelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Model data prepared for code generation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CodeGenerationDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CodeGeneratorTool
]

instance CodeGeneratorTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Toolchain for generating C++ or Java artefacts from MontiArc and SysML models"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeGenerationService
]

instance CodeGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that generates C++/Java artefacts from MBSE models"
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateCppAction
]

instance GenerateCppAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to generate C++ artefacts from MontiArc and SysML models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton model used for code generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CodeGeneratorTool
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle follows a tiered abstraction model derived from MBSE practices. Initial stages comprise requirements capture, followed by functional architecture design. A logical architecture layer is then defined using Architecture Description Languages (ADLs) such as SysML interaction diagrams (IBDs), MontiArc, ACME, or AADL to model component and connector relationships. The product/technical layer represents the final implementation using embedded code (C++ or Java) or simulation models (MathWorks Simulink). Transition management between stages is achieved through traceability links between SysML requirements, functional blocks, logical components, and implementation artefacts. Lifecycle governance is supported by adopting MBSE methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, or SMArDT to structure progression, enforce version control, and maintain consistency."
]
